description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with exaggerated, elongated limbs and angular, abstract extensions protruding from the arms, giving a surreal and stylized appearance. The figure wears a short-sleeved top, a knee-length skirt, and a beret, with visible socks and shoes. The arms are dramatically extended outward and upward, forming sharp, geometric shapes that dominate the silhouette. The head is slightly tilted, and the posture suggests a suspended or mid-motion pose. The overall design is highly stylized, blending human features with abstract, almost mechanical extensions. The surface appears smooth and matte, with a mix of dark and muted tones.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with elongated, angular arm extensions, wearing a skirt, top, and beret, in a dynamic, suspended pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the dramatic angular extensions of the arms spreading outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, the bent leg, and the depth of the angular arm extensions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back, legs, and the full span of the geometric arm extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, the arm extensions, and the posture of the legs.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved top, knee-length skirt, beret, socks
attribute_posture: suspended with arms extended outward and upward
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with side part
